summary.intro:
Hi Sarah,
Based on your answers, your results show you're in the business-building stage — working with real momentum and real gaps at the same time. 11 Foundation-level signal(s) detected across the 12 domains. Critical Foundation blockers present: undefined primary offer (Q1=A); no structured CRM (Q4=A/B); no follow-up automation (Q5=A/B). Here's what your results show.
summary.narrative_paragraph_1: The clearest friction right now sits in Clarity & Offer System, Presence System, Lead Capture System. Offer clarity is one of the most important foundations a business can have — and one of the hardest to nail down, especially when you're talented in more than one area. Not having a structured website yet means that right now, your business likely relies on word of mouth, social media, or direct outreach to connect with potential clients — and while those can work, they put a ceiling on how far your reach can grow.
summary.narrative_paragraph_2: Once the systems in your priority areas are installed and running consistently, the business becomes more predictable, easier to manage, and ready to grow without depending entirely on your personal effort.
recommended_focus_areas: Clarity & Offer System: one clear primary offer with a defined call to action.
Presence System: a website that guides the right visitor to take the next step.
Lead Capture System: an automated process so every inquiry receives an immediate response.
Customer Journey / CRM System: a single place to track every lead and client consistently.
Nurture & Follow-Up System: automated sequences so every lead stays warm without manual effort.
summary.graduation_outlook: Once you have one clear offer, a structured website, a basic CRM, and automated follow-up in place, you'll be ready to move into the Growth pathway — where your focus shifts from building the basics to running them reliably and adding delivery and payment systems that scale with your client volume.
summary.full_report_text:
Hi Sarah,
Based on your answers, your results show you're in the business-building stage — working with real momentum and real gaps at the same time. 11 Foundation-level signal(s) detected across the 12 domains. Critical Foundation blockers present: undefined primary offer (Q1=A); no structured CRM (Q4=A/B); no follow-up automation (Q5=A/B). Here's what your results show.

The clearest friction right now sits in Clarity & Offer System, Presence System, Lead Capture System. Offer clarity is one of the most important foundations a business can have — and one of the hardest to nail down, especially when you're talented in more than one area. Not having a structured website yet means that right now, your business likely relies on word of mouth, social media, or direct outreach to connect with potential clients — and while those can work, they put a ceiling on how far your reach can grow.

Once the systems in your priority areas are installed and running consistently, the business becomes more predictable, easier to manage, and ready to grow without depending entirely on your personal effort.

Your recommended focus areas:
- Clarity & Offer System: one clear primary offer with a defined call to action.
- Presence System: a website that guides the right visitor to take the next step.
- Lead Capture System: an automated process so every inquiry receives an immediate response.
- Customer Journey / CRM System: a single place to track every lead and client consistently.
- Nurture & Follow-Up System: automated sequences so every lead stays warm without manual effort.

Once you have one clear offer, a structured website, a basic CRM, and automated follow-up in place, you'll be ready to move into the Growth pathway — where your focus shifts from building the basics to running them reliably and adding delivery and payment systems that scale with your client volume.

priority_actions: Define and lock in ONE primary offer with a clear call to action before building anything else.
Build a simple, structured website with a single clear conversion path.
Set up a basic CRM or pipeline to track every lead and client in one place.
Implement at minimum an automated email confirmation after every inquiry.
Create a repeatable onboarding checklist so every client experience starts consistently.
anti_priority_warnings: Don't invest in paid advertising before your offer, landing page, and lead capture are solid.
Don't layer AI tools onto systems that don't yet exist — foundations come first.
Don't attempt to build retention workflows until your delivery and onboarding are consistent.
